processes.name: completePurchaseOrder
preconditions: Order must have at least one line
Order status must be DR (Draft) or IP (In Progress)
All order lines must have a product assigned
All order lines must have a positive quantity

steps.name: validatePreconditions
steps.description: Check that the purchase order meets all preconditions before completing

operation.errorMessage: Purchase order does not meet completion preconditions

behavioral.expectedBehavior: Reject orders missing lines, wrong status, lines without product, or zero/negative qty

steps.name: assignDocumentNumber
steps.description: Assign the next document number from the sequence to the purchase order

behavioral.expectedBehavior: Purchase order receives the next available document number from the configured sequence

steps.name: calculateTax
steps.description: Calculate tax amounts for the purchase order

behavioral.expectedBehavior: Grand total is updated with the calculated tax amount

steps.name: postAccounting
steps.description: Post accounting entries for the completed purchase order

behavioral.expectedBehavior: Accounting entries are created and the order is marked as posted

steps.name: updateStatusComplete
steps.description: Set purchase order status to CO, mark as processed

behavioral.expectedBehavior: Order status becomes CO, processed=true, documentAction='--'

edgeCases.description: Purchase order has no lines - must reject with clear error
One or more lines have zero or negative quantity
edgeCases.expectedBehavior: Validation fails indicating invalid line quantities

edgeCases.description: A line exists without a product assigned
edgeCases.expectedBehavior: Validation fails indicating missing product on line
Entire transaction rolls back - status remains unchanged

processes.name: voidPurchaseOrder
preconditions: No goods receipts must exist for this order

steps.name: validateStatusCompleted
steps.description: Verify the purchase order is in Completed status before allowing void

operation.errorMessage: Only completed purchase orders can be voided

behavioral.expectedBehavior: Reject void action if order is not in CO status

steps.name: reverseAccounting
steps.description: Reverse accounting entries created during completion

behavioral.expectedBehavior: All accounting entries from completion are reversed

steps.name: updateStatusVoid
steps.description: Set purchase order status to VO and clear the document action

edgeCases.description: Attempt to void a draft purchase order (status DR)
Attempt to void an order that is already voided (status VO)
edgeCases.expectedBehavior: Validation fails - cannot void an already voided order

edgeCases.description: Attempt to void a purchase order that has goods receipts
edgeCases.expectedBehavior: Validation fails - cannot void order with existing receipts
